text: I stayed up all night worrying that I will mess this up again.
notes: Work anxiety with explicit need for help

text: My chest feels heavy and I do not want to talk to anyone right now.
The release failed again and I am furious that we are still blocked.
I finally got the offer letter and I cannot stop smiling.
Nothing dramatic happened today. I just finished errands and had dinner.
Your message really helped me settle down. I feel hopeful again.
I am overwhelmed by deadlines and need someone to help me decide what to do first.
I feel completely alone and I do not know how much more of this I can take.
I keep redoing the same task because every version comes back broken.
I am proud of how far I have come this year and I want to celebrate this moment.
Things are steady now. I am not excited or upset, just moving through the day.
I appreciate everyone who checked in on me today. It reminded me that things can improve.
